_comment: Model registry — canonical model definitions used by OpenClaw agent sessions.

models.description: High-frequency workhorse: L1 scenes (copilot/instructor/navigator/autopilot), L2 execution (engineer/publisher). SWE-bench 80.2%, 1M context. Coding Plan billing.
Deep analysis + reasoning: researcher agent. AIME 91.3, 1M context, fast (1/6 Claude speed). Per-token billing.
Quality + creative: reviewer (审查), writer (写作), admin (系统评估). SWE-bench 77.8%, LMArena Text+Code #1 open source. 128K context. Per-token billing.
Alias for review — same GLM-5 model. Used by writer agent for creative writing with human-like alignment.
Text embedding fallback. 1024 dimensions, bilingual zh/en. Primary is local-embedding.
Local 32B model via Ollama (M4 Pro, ~10 tok/s). Use for: triage, guardrails, replan gate, structured extraction. Zero API cost.
Local 7B model via Ollama (M4 Pro, ~35 tok/s). Use for: classification, summarization, quick judgment. Zero API cost.
Local embedding primary. 768 dimensions, 47ms on M4 Pro. Zero cost.
